foodDescription: Aromatic and flavorful chicken biryani cooked with basmati rice, tender chicken pieces, and a perfect blend of traditional spices.
Juicy grilled beef patty layered with fresh lettuce, tomato, cheese, and special sauce inside a soft toasted bun. Perfectly balanced taste of savory beef and fresh vegetables in every bite.
Classic Italian pizza topped with rich tomato sauce, melted mozzarella cheese, and fresh basil leaves. Baked to perfection with a crispy crust and soft cheesy center.
Crispy golden fried chicken with a crunchy outer layer and juicy tender meat inside. Marinated with special spices to deliver a rich and satisfying flavor in every bite.
Creamy Alfredo pasta made with fresh cream, garlic butter sauce, and tender chicken pieces. A smooth, rich, and comforting dish perfect for pasta lovers.
Freshly grilled fish seasoned with herbs, lemon, and light spices. Cooked to perfection with a smoky flavor and served with fresh salad for a healthy meal option.
Soft wrap filled with juicy chicken slices, fresh vegetables, and creamy garlic sauce. A popular street food known for its rich and spicy Middle Eastern flavors.
Fresh vegetable sandwich loaded with lettuce, cucumber, tomato, and cheese. Light, healthy, and perfect for a quick snack or breakfast option.
Refreshing mango juice made from fresh ripe mangoes. Naturally sweet, chilled, and perfect to cool down on hot summer days.
Rich and moist chocolate cake layered with creamy chocolate frosting. A perfect dessert for chocolate lovers with a soft and indulgent texture.
Spicy grilled beef kebabs cooked over charcoal for a smoky and juicy flavor. Served with chutney and salad for a complete traditional taste.
Crispy chicken nuggets made from tender chicken pieces coated in a crunchy golden crust. Perfect snack for kids and adults alike.
Delicious fried rice cooked with vegetables, eggs, and soy sauce. Lightly spiced and full of flavor, perfect as a quick meal option.
Soft bun filled with juicy sausage, ketchup, mustard, and fresh toppings. A simple yet tasty street-style snack loved by many.
Creamy and cold ice cream available in different flavors. Smooth texture with a sweet taste that melts in your mouth instantly.
Traditional chicken curry cooked with rich spices, onions, and tomatoes. A flavorful dish best enjoyed with rice or bread.
Fresh mixed vegetable salad with lettuce, cucumber, carrot, and light dressing. A healthy and refreshing meal choice.
Layered meat slices cooked slowly on a rotating spit, served in wrap or plate with sauces and vegetables. Rich and flavorful street food.
Hot and spicy chicken wings coated with special seasoning and fried to crispy perfection. Perfect for snack lovers who enjoy heat and flavor.
Rich and thick traditional halim cooked slowly with wheat, lentils, and meat. Full of flavor and energy, especially popular during special occasions.
